zh.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon是Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac的兒子，於1060年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 布薩。他和Hawise de Monmouth至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1130年之前在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯 卡素，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon was born in 1060, in La Boussac, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France as the son of Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Hawise de Monmouth. He died before 1130, in Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon est né en 1060, à La Boussac, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, fils de Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Hawise de Monmouth. Il est décédé avant 1130, à Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon wurde 1060 in La Boussac, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac geboren. Er hatte mit Hawise de Monmouth mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1130 in Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon è nato il nel 1060 nel La Boussac, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia come figlio di Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Hawise de Monmouth. Morì prima del 1130, nel Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderonは1060年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインラ ボウッサックでBaderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussacの息子として生まれた。彼はHawise de Monmouthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1130年以前にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウス カストルで死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon(은)는 1060년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 라 부사크에서 Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Hawise de Monmouth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1130년 이전 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon nasceu em 1060, em La Boussac, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França filho de Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Hawise de Monmouth. Ele faleceu antes 1130, em Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William FitzBaderon родился в 1060 г. в местности ла боуссак, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. Его отца звали Baderon I FitzCaradoc, Lord of La Boussac. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Hawise de Monmouth. Он умер перед 1130 г. в местности монмоут кастл, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
